result.summary:
**DISH Network L.L.C.** is a Colorado-based single-member LLC, incorporated on March 26, 1987, operating as a disregarded entity of its parent **DISH DBS Corporation** (EIN 84-1328967), with principal offices at 9601 S. Meridian Blvd., Englewood, CO 80112, and a remit-to address at PO Box 94063, Palatine, IL 60094-4063.[1][4][5] Its registered agent for civil service is **Corporation Service Company (CSC)**, with courtesy copies directed to Subpoenas@dish.com; an affiliated entity, DISH Holding L.L.C., lists R. Stanton Dodge as registered agent in Colorado.[4][6] The company, formerly EchoStar Satellite L.L.C., provides satellite TV services under the DISH brand.[1][3][5]

DISH Network L.L.C. faced significant telemarketing enforcement in 2009 when the FTC and DOJ sued it in the Northern District of Illinois (Case 3:09-cv-03073) for National Do Not Call Registry violations and Telemarketing Sales Rule breaches via robocalls by authorized dealers.[3] No additional FCC, state-AG, or recent TCPA suits are detailed in available sources, though related entities like DISH Holding appear in FCC complaints; BBB complaint volume is not specified.[6] **Reachable.**
